The '''School of Torturers''' was a facility set up by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] during the years of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. It served as the focal point in specialized training of individuals in the fine art of [[Torture/Legends|torture]].

[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operative [[Jan Ors]] attempted to [[Death/Legends|assassinate]] the school's Head, taking on an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] identity to do so. However, [[Gender/Legends|her]] cover was blown, necessitating her extraction by fellow Rebel agent [[Kyle Katarn]].<ref name="Dark" />

The head of the School was murdered by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] partisans during the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|liberation of Coruscant]].
